raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need command: tar -xzO -C /system folder2.tar.gz | grep -i special? Actually recursively unzip: tar -xzO -C /system folder2.tar.gz extracts to stdout? tar -xzO -f file.tar.gz extracts all files to stdout. Then grep. So: tar -xzO -f /system/folder2.tar.gz | grep -i special.
